/**

 * an optional {@linkplain FilePosition file position}.

javadoc_after:
/** * Class based {@link org.junit.platform.engine.TestSource TestSource} with * an optional {@linkplain FilePosition file position}. * *

If a Java {@link Class} reference is provided, the {@code ClassSource} * will contain that {@code Class} and its class name accordingly. If a class * name is provided, the {@code ClassSource} will contain the class name and * will only attempt to lazily load the {@link Class} if {@link #getJavaClass()} * is invoked. * *

In this context, Java {@link Class} means anything that can be referenced * as a {@link Class} on the JVM — for example, classes from other JVM * languages such Groovy, Scala, etc. * * @since 1.0 * @see org.junit.platform.engine.discovery.ClassSelector */
